name: DeepSeek-V4-Pro
_comment_mla: Multi-head Latent Attention (DSv3 family). Real KV cache stores the head-shared latent (d_c + d_qk_rope) = 576 dims at FP4 = 288 bytes/tok/layer; matches the DSv3 worked example in attention.md §3.8. n_kv is set to canonical n_q and is ignored when mla is present.
_comment_k_active: 6 routed experts + 1 shared expert (always active). Shared expert approximated by k=7.
_comment_caveats: Architecture-specific extensions NOT modeled: Compressed Sparse Attention (CSA), Heavily Compressed Attention (HCA), Multi-Token Prediction (MTP) head with num_nextn_predict_layers=1, sliding_window=128 on attention. These reduce real per-token compute and KV traffic vs the framework's MLA + MoE generic forms; predicted decode latency is therefore an upper bound.
